title: Biscuits Gift Set Hamper Bundle Contains 30 Packs of Individually Wrapped Biscuits Multipacks. Lordingtons Gift Hamper Includes a Variety of Loved Treats
features: Lordingtons biscuit gifts set contains 30 packets of the nation’s favourite assorted biscuits. All inside a timeless box, tied off with a luxurious red ribbon.
The perfect biscuit hamper gifts for women and men - Exquisitely curated with biscuits individually wrapped, delivering love and sophistication in every bite, ideal for unforgettable gifting.
Elegant biscuit box - Savor our biscuits gift which is crafted to melt hearts with buttery bliss, perfect for creating cherished moments of joy and indulgence with this thoughtful gift.
Delight in our biscuits individually wrapped - Presented in a gorgeous biscuit box with navy shredded paper and red ribbon, a shortbread biscuits gift that evokes warmth and creates lasting memories.
Gift hampers for women and men - Brimming with a luxurious box of biscuits, designed to enchant and pamper, turning every occasion into a heartfelt celebration of elegance.
description: Product Description Unwrap happiness with our biscuit hamper, a thoughtfully curated biscuits gift big enough to share. This shortbread biscuits gift features individual biscuits wrapped for freshness, including multipack biscuits and individual wrapped biscuits packs. The treat box brims with biscuit bars, mini biscuits individually wrapped, and a bulk biscuits assortment that delights with every bite. Presented in biscuit boxes with a charming design, this box of biscuits individually wrapped is perfect for celebrating life’s special moments. Whether it’s a cozy afternoon tea or a festive gathering, this biscuit bags collection brings people together with its timeless appeal. Indulge in the heartwarming delight of our biscuits gift set, a perfect treat for any occasion. This luxurious hamper gifts for women is brimming with individually wrapped biscuits, ensuring every bite is fresh and full of flavour. From the buttery richness of shortbread biscuits to the irresistible charm of Walkers biscuits, each biscuit box is crafted to evoke joy and nostalgia. Whether it’s a birthday or a thoughtful gesture, this biscuits multipacks selection brings warmth to every moment. The elegant packaging transforms this box of biscuits into a cherished gift, ideal for sharing love with those who matter most. Discover the joy of our Lordingtons biscuits gift, designed to captivate the senses and warm the heart. This biscuit hamper gift set is a delightful assortment of luxury biscuits, including Border biscuits gift set and English biscuits gift set varieties. Each biscuits individually wrapped treat is nestled in a beautifully presented big biscuit box, perfect for gifting to women who adore a sweet escape. The biscuit selection includes mini biscuits and assorted biscuits, offering a variety of textures and tastes to savour. This buscuits collection is a heartfelt way to show appreciation, making every occasion unforgettable.

product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Ingredients listed on each item. Contains: Wheat flour, wholemeal wheat flour, sugar, vegetable oil (palm, rapeseed), butter (milk), oats, dark chocolate chips (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, emulsifier: soya lecithin, natural vanilla flavouring), milk chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soya lecithin, natural vanilla flavouring), white chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin, natural vanilla flavouring), fat-reduced cocoa powder, glucose syrup, dextrose, wheat starch, raising agents (sodium bicarbonate, ammonium bicarbonate), salt, natural flavouring, dried whey (milk), ginger, desiccated coconut, dried fruit (currants, sultanas, raisins), lemon oil, honey, butterscotch pieces (sugar, glucose syrup, butter, natural flavouring), cherries, almonds, raspberries, invert sugar syrup, molasses, emulsifier: soya lecithin, barley malt extract.
